toolDocs.name: create_project
toolDocs.title: Create AutoPlan project
toolDocs.description: Create a project and return its id plus a snapshot summary.
toolDocs.markdown:
## create_project
**功能**：Create a project and return its id plus a snapshot summary.
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 120 |
| `workspacePath` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 1000 |
| `description` | `string` | 否 | 最长 5000 |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |
| `codexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Legacy Codex reasoning effort. Only applies when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planGenerationStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan generation strategy: legacy external Markdown, external structured PlanSpec, or builtin LLM structured PlanSpec.；可选：`external-cli-markdown`, `external-cli-structured`, `builtin-llm-structured` |
| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planExecutionStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan execution strategy. external-cli is supported; builtin-llm is accepted but task execution currently returns a clear unsupported error.；可选：`external-cli`, `builtin-llm` |
| `planExecutionProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan execution. external-cli uses CLI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planExecutionCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan execution.；最长 1000 |
| `planExecutionModel` | `string` | 否 | Reserved model name for builtin LLM plan execution.；最长 200 |
| `planExecutionCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan execution when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |

toolDocs.name: create_requirement
toolDocs.title: Create AutoPlan requirement
toolDocs.description: Create a requirement, optionally save attachments and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed requirements with the same normalized title and body in the project are rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingRequirementId.
toolDocs.markdown:
## create_requirement
**功能**：Create a requirement, optionally save attachments and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed requirements with the same normalized title and body in the project are rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingRequirementId.
**重复提交**：同项目内 normalized title/body 相同且未 closed 的需求会被拒绝，错误返回 `code=DUPLICATE_INTAKE` 和 `existingRequirementId`。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `title` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 200 |
| `body` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 100000 |
| `attachments` | `array<object>` | 否 | 最多 20 项 |
| `  name` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 255 |
| `  size` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 0 |
| `  source` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`path`, `clipboard-image` |
| `  path` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 2000 |
| `  type` | `string` | 否 | MIME type；最短 1；最长 200 |
| `  dataUrl` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  base64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  dataBase64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  bytes` | `array<integer>` | 否 | 最多 10485760 项 |
| `autoRun` | `boolean` | 否 | - |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`open`, `completed`, `closed` |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |
| `codexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Legacy Codex reasoning effort. Only applies when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planGenerationStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan generation strategy: legacy external Markdown, external structured PlanSpec, or builtin LLM structured PlanSpec.；可选：`external-cli-markdown`, `external-cli-structured`, `builtin-llm-structured` |
| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |

toolDocs.name: list_executors
toolDocs.title: List AutoPlan executors
toolDocs.description: List configured workspace executors for a project, including recent status and log tails. Executors run only saved commands in the project workspace; debug launch/configuration is not supported.
toolDocs.markdown:
## list_executors
**功能**：List configured workspace executors for a project, including recent status and log tails. Executors run only saved commands in the project workspace; debug launch/configuration is not supported.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Optional label substring filter.；最长 200 |
| `group` | `string` | 否 | Optional exact group kind filter, for example build or test.；最长 120 |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | Optional current or recent run status filter.；可选：`idle`, `running`, `ok`, `bad`, `stopped` |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | 否 | Optional enabled-state filter. |
| `limit` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 1；最大 200 |

toolDocs.name: run_executor
toolDocs.title: Run AutoPlan executor
toolDocs.description: Run an existing executor by executorId or exact label. This tool does not accept arbitrary command strings, returns status with a log tail, and has no debug support.
toolDocs.markdown:
## run_executor
**功能**：Run an existing executor by executorId or exact label. This tool does not accept arbitrary command strings, returns status with a log tail, and has no debug support.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `executorId` | `integer` | 否 | Existing executor id in the project. Provide executorId or label.；最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Exact existing executor label in the project. Provide executorId or label. Command/debug/launch fields are not accepted.；最短 1；最长 200 |

toolDocs.name: stop_executor
toolDocs.title: Stop AutoPlan executor
toolDocs.description: Stop a running executor by executorId or exact label. This only targets existing executor operations and has no debug support.
toolDocs.markdown:
## stop_executor
**功能**：Stop a running executor by executorId or exact label. This only targets existing executor operations and has no debug support.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `executorId` | `integer` | 否 | Existing executor id in the project. Provide executorId or label.；最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Exact existing executor label in the project. Provide executorId or label. Command/debug/launch fields are not accepted.；最短 1；最长 200 |

toolDocs.markdown:
## create_feedback
**功能**：Create feedback, optionally associate it with a requirement and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed feedback with the same normalized title and body in the same project and requirement association is rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingFeedbackId.
**重复提交**：同项目、同 requirement 关联下 normalized title/body 相同且未 closed 的反馈会被拒绝，错误返回 `code=DUPLICATE_INTAKE` 和 `existingFeedbackId`。

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `requirementId` | `integer \| null` | 否 | 最小 1 |
| `title` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 200 |
| `body` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 100000 |
| `attachments` | `array<object>` | 否 | 最多 20 项 |
| `  name` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 255 |
| `  size` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 0 |
| `  source` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`path`, `clipboard-image` |
| `  path` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 2000 |
| `  type` | `string` | 否 | MIME type；最短 1；最长 200 |
| `  dataUrl` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  base64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  dataBase64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  bytes` | `array<integer>` | 否 | 最多 10485760 项 |
| `autoRun` | `boolean` | 否 | - |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`open`, `completed`, `closed` |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |

| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |

toolDocs.markdown:
## list_executors
**功能**：List configured workspace executors for a project, including recent status and log tails. Executors run only saved commands in the project workspace; debug launch/configuration is not supported.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Optional label substring filter.；最长 200 |
| `group` | `string` | 否 | Optional exact group kind filter, for example build or test.；最长 120 |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | Optional current or recent run status filter.；可选：`idle`, `running`, `ok`, `bad`, `stopped` |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | 否 | Optional enabled-state filter. |
| `limit` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 1；最大 200 |

## run_executor
**功能**：Run an existing executor by executorId or exact label. This tool does not accept arbitrary command strings, returns status with a log tail, and has no debug support.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `executorId` | `integer` | 否 | Existing executor id in the project. Provide executorId or label.；最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Exact existing executor label in the project. Provide executorId or label. Command/debug/launch fields are not accepted.；最短 1；最长 200 |

toolDocs.description: Run an existing executor by executorId or exact label. This tool does not accept arbitrary command strings, returns status with a log tail, and has no debug support.
toolDocs.markdown:
## run_executor
**功能**：Run an existing executor by executorId or exact label. This tool does not accept arbitrary command strings, returns status with a log tail, and has no debug support.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `executorId` | `integer` | 否 | Existing executor id in the project. Provide executorId or label.；最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Exact existing executor label in the project. Provide executorId or label. Command/debug/launch fields are not accepted.；最短 1；最长 200 |

toolDocs.name: create_project
toolDocs.title: Create AutoPlan project
toolDocs.description: Create a project and return its id plus a snapshot summary.
toolDocs.markdown:
## create_project
**功能**：Create a project and return its id plus a snapshot summary.
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 120 |
| `workspacePath` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 1000 |
| `description` | `string` | 否 | 最长 5000 |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |
| `codexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Legacy Codex reasoning effort. Only applies when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planGenerationStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan generation strategy: legacy external Markdown, external structured PlanSpec, or builtin LLM structured PlanSpec.；可选：`external-cli-markdown`, `external-cli-structured`, `builtin-llm-structured` |
| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planExecutionStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan execution strategy. external-cli is supported; builtin-llm is accepted but task execution currently returns a clear unsupported error.；可选：`external-cli`, `builtin-llm` |
| `planExecutionProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan execution. external-cli uses CLI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planExecutionCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan execution.；最长 1000 |
| `planExecutionModel` | `string` | 否 | Reserved model name for builtin LLM plan execution.；最长 200 |
| `planExecutionCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan execution when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |

toolDocs.name: create_requirement
toolDocs.title: Create AutoPlan requirement
toolDocs.description: Create a requirement, optionally save attachments and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed requirements with the same normalized title and body in the project are rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingRequirementId.
toolDocs.markdown:
## create_requirement
**功能**：Create a requirement, optionally save attachments and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed requirements with the same normalized title and body in the project are rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingRequirementId.
**重复提交**：同项目内 normalized title/body 相同且未 closed 的需求会被拒绝，错误返回 `code=DUPLICATE_INTAKE` 和 `existingRequirementId`。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `title` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 200 |
| `body` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 100000 |
| `attachments` | `array<object>` | 否 | 最多 20 项 |
| `  name` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 255 |
| `  size` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 0 |
| `  source` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`path`, `clipboard-image` |
| `  path` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 2000 |
| `  type` | `string` | 否 | MIME type；最短 1；最长 200 |
| `  dataUrl` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  base64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  dataBase64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  bytes` | `array<integer>` | 否 | 最多 10485760 项 |
| `autoRun` | `boolean` | 否 | - |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`open`, `completed`, `closed` |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |
| `codexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Legacy Codex reasoning effort. Only applies when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planGenerationStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan generation strategy: legacy external Markdown, external structured PlanSpec, or builtin LLM structured PlanSpec.；可选：`external-cli-markdown`, `external-cli-structured`, `builtin-llm-structured` |
| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |

toolDocs.name: list_executors
toolDocs.title: List AutoPlan executors
toolDocs.description: List configured workspace executors for a project, including recent status and log tails. Executors run only saved commands in the project workspace; debug launch/configuration is not supported.
toolDocs.markdown:
## list_executors
**功能**：List configured workspace executors for a project, including recent status and log tails. Executors run only saved commands in the project workspace; debug launch/configuration is not supported.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Optional label substring filter.；最长 200 |
| `group` | `string` | 否 | Optional exact group kind filter, for example build or test.；最长 120 |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | Optional current or recent run status filter.；可选：`idle`, `running`, `ok`, `bad`, `stopped` |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | 否 | Optional enabled-state filter. |
| `limit` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 1；最大 200 |

**功能**：Create a requirement, optionally save attachments and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed requirements with the same normalized title and body in the project are rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingRequirementId.

| `  base64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  dataBase64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  bytes` | `array<integer>` | 否 | 最多 10485760 项 |
| `autoRun` | `boolean` | 否 | - |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`open`, `completed`, `closed` |

toolDocs.name: list_executors

toolDocs.markdown:
## list_executors
**功能**：List configured workspace executors for a project, including recent status and log tails. Executors run only saved commands in the project workspace; debug launch/configuration is not supported.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Optional label substring filter.；最长 200 |
| `group` | `string` | 否 | Optional exact group kind filter, for example build or test.；最长 120 |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | Optional current or recent run status filter.；可选：`idle`, `running`, `ok`, `bad`, `stopped` |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | 否 | Optional enabled-state filter. |
| `limit` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 1；最大 200 |

## run_executor
**功能**：Run an existing executor by executorId or exact label. This tool does not accept arbitrary command strings, returns status with a log tail, and has no debug support.
**执行器约束**：仅操作当前项目内已保存的执行器；run/stop 不接受临时 command、launch 或 debug 参数；运行结果只返回状态、退出码、耗时和日志尾部。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `executorId` | `integer` | 否 | Existing executor id in the project. Provide executorId or label.；最小 1 |
| `label` | `string` | 否 | Exact existing executor label in the project. Provide executorId or label. Command/debug/launch fields are not accepted.；最短 1；最长 200 |

toolDocs.markdown:
## create_project
**功能**：Create a project and return its id plus a snapshot summary.
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 120 |
| `workspacePath` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 1000 |
| `description` | `string` | 否 | 最长 5000 |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |
| `codexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Legacy Codex reasoning effort. Only applies when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planGenerationStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan generation strategy: legacy external Markdown, external structured PlanSpec, or builtin LLM structured PlanSpec.；可选：`external-cli-markdown`, `external-cli-structured`, `builtin-llm-structured` |
| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planExecutionStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan execution strategy. external-cli is supported; builtin-llm is accepted but task execution currently returns a clear unsupported error.；可选：`external-cli`, `builtin-llm` |
| `planExecutionProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan execution. external-cli uses CLI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planExecutionCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan execution.；最长 1000 |
| `planExecutionModel` | `string` | 否 | Reserved model name for builtin LLM plan execution.；最长 200 |
| `planExecutionCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan execution when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |

toolDocs.markdown:
## create_requirement
**功能**：Create a requirement, optionally save attachments and start the project loop. Duplicate non-closed requirements with the same normalized title and body in the project are rejected with code DUPLICATE_INTAKE and existingRequirementId.
**重复提交**：同项目内 normalized title/body 相同且未 closed 的需求会被拒绝，错误返回 `code=DUPLICATE_INTAKE` 和 `existingRequirementId`。
**参数**

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `projectId` | `integer` | 是 | 最小 1 |
| `title` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 200 |
| `body` | `string` | 是 | 最短 1；最长 100000 |
| `attachments` | `array<object>` | 否 | 最多 20 项 |
| `  name` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 255 |
| `  size` | `integer` | 否 | 最小 0 |
| `  source` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`path`, `clipboard-image` |
| `  path` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 2000 |
| `  type` | `string` | 否 | MIME type；最短 1；最长 200 |
| `  dataUrl` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  base64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  dataBase64` | `string` | 否 | 最短 1；最长 10485760 |
| `  bytes` | `array<integer>` | 否 | 最多 10485760 项 |
| `autoRun` | `boolean` | 否 | - |
| `status` | `string` | 否 | 可选：`open`, `completed`, `closed` |
| `agentCliProvider` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI provider. Project-level input maps to generation and execution defaults when new fields are omitted; intake-level input maps to plan generation only.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi` |
| `agentCliCommand` | `string` | 否 | Legacy external CLI command override.；最长 1000 |
| `codexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Legacy Codex reasoning effort. Only applies when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
| `planGenerationStrategy` | `string` | 否 | Plan generation strategy: legacy external Markdown, external structured PlanSpec, or builtin LLM structured PlanSpec.；可选：`external-cli-markdown`, `external-cli-structured`, `builtin-llm-structured` |
| `planGenerationProvider` | `string` | 否 | Provider for plan generation. External strategies use CLI providers; builtin LLM uses AI providers.；可选：`codex`, `claude`, `opencode`, `oh-my-pi`, `openai`, `deepseek`, `anthropic` |
| `planGenerationCommand` | `string` | 否 | Command for external CLI plan generation strategies.；最长 1000 |
| `planGenerationModel` | `string` | 否 | Model name for builtin LLM plan generation.；最长 200 |
| `planGenerationCodexReasoningEffort` | `string` | 否 | Codex reasoning effort for plan generation when the effective provider is codex.；可选：`low`, `medium`, `high`, `xhigh` |
